name: Peter Kinnart
background: Peter Kinnart has been the Chief Financial Officer since 2021. He joined Atlas Copco in 1993 and has held several financial and operational positions within the Group, including Vice President Business Control for the Compressor Technique business area.

company_affiliations.name: Atlas Copco AB
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various management positions (including Controller at Atlas Copco Airpower)
